nodes.label: What To Emphasize In An Interview
nodes.norm_label: what to emphasize in an interview

nodes.label: Two-Layer SQL Safety Model
nodes.rationale: SQL safety must be preserved by both application validation and read-only SQLite access so either layer can independently block mutation or unsafe access.

nodes.label: Separate SQL Generation and Answer Composition Calls
nodes.rationale: SQL generation and answer composition are kept separate to avoid giving the answer step query-generation or execution capability.
nodes.norm_label: separate sql generation and answer composition calls

nodes.label: Schema and ALLOWED Synchronization
nodes.rationale: New tables or columns require updates to both db/schema.sql and the sql_guard ALLOWED map so legitimate SQL is not rejected by the validator.

nodes.label: Read-Only Database Access
nodes.rationale: The SQLite connector must use mode=ro as a second independent safety layer beneath SQL validation.

nodes.label: Default Breakdown Behavior
nodes.rationale: Broad category questions should default to grouped subtype breakdowns so users get detail and totals without unnecessary clarification.

nodes.label: Clarify When Ambiguous
nodes.rationale: The system should ask a clarifying question only when a reasonable SELECT cannot be inferred from the user request.
